events.core_change: The protagonist joins Remilia's foretold entrance without surrendering the right to choose why they arrived or what they believe.
Remilia uses status-sensitive mist paths to prevent collisions and revises ceremony when it stops serving the people inside it.

events.title_en: Do Not Laugh at the Wrong Thing
events.core_change: The protagonist returns the floor after a lazy public joke so Remilia can repair her own dignity without denial, flattery, or infantilization.
